    # deduplicate by full_name
    seen = set()
    unique = []
    for item in all_items:
        name = item['full_name']
        if name not in seen:
            seen.add(name)
            unique.append(item)
    # score each repo
    scored = []
    for repo in unique:
        score = repo.get('stargazers_count', 0)
        if is_likely_official(repo, acronym):
            score += 10000
        scored.append((score, repo))
    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    if scored:
        return scored[0][1]['html_url']
    return None

    for line in lines:

        if not line:

        pid, title = extract_id_title(line)
        if not pid:

        print(f'Processing paper {pid}: {title}', file=sys.stderr)
        url = find_official_repo(title)
        if url is None:

        results.append({

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# GitHub API search
search() {
    query=$(echo "$1" | sed 's/ /+/g')
    curl -s -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json' \
        "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=$query"
}

# extract id and title from line
extract() {
    line="$1"
    if [[ $line =~ ^([0-9]+)\.\s+(.+)$ ]]; then
        id="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
        title="${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
        echo "$id" "$title"
    fi
}

# get acronym from title (first word before colon)
acronym() {
    title="$1"
    if [[ $title =~ ^([^:]+): ]]; then
        echo "${BASH_REMATCH[1]}" | xargs
    else
        echo "$title" | awk '{print $1}'
    fi
}

# determine if repo is likely official
is_likely() {
    repo="$1"
    acronym="$2"
    full_name=$(echo "$repo" | jq -r '.full_name' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
    desc=$(echo "$repo" | jq -r '.description // ""' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
    # check acronym in full_name
    if [[ -n "$acronym" && $full_name == *"$(echo "$acronym" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"* ]]; then
        return 0
    fi
    # known orgs
    orgs="facebookresearch google-research microsoft deepmind openai meta-llama kaiminghe facebook google mit stanford cmu ucla oxford berkeley"
    for org in $orgs; do
        if [[ $full_name == "$org/"* ]]; then
            return 0
        fi
    done
    # official in description
    if [[ $desc == *official* ]]; then
        return 0
    fi
    return 1
}

# find best repo for a title
find_repo() {
    title="$1"
    queries=("$title" "$title official code" "$title github" "$title implementation")
    acro=$(acronym "$title")
    if [[ -n "$acro" ]]; then
        queries+=("$acro" "$acro github")
    fi
    best_score=0
    best_url=""
    for q in "${queries[@]}"; do
        echo "Searching: $q" >&2
        resp=$(search "$q")
        items=$(echo "$resp" | jq -c '.items[]?' 2>/dev/null || true)
        while IFS= read -r item; do
            if [[ -z "$item" ]]; then continue; fi
            stars=$(echo "$item" | jq -r '.stargazers_count // 0')
            url=$(echo "$item" | jq -r '.html_url')
            score=$stars
            if is_likely "$item" "$acro"; then
                score=$((score + 10000))
            fi
            if [[ $score -gt $best_score ]]; then
                best_score=$score
                best_url="$url"
            fi
        done <<< "$items"
        sleep 1
    done
    echo "$best_url"
}

# main
while IFS= read -r line; do
    if [[ -z "$line" ]]; then continue; fi
    read -r pid title <<< "$(extract "$line")"
    if [[ -z "$pid" ]]; then continue; fi
    echo "Processing paper $pid: $title" >&2
    url=$(find_repo "$title")
    if [[ -z "$url" ]]; then
        url=""
    fi
    jq -n --arg pid "$pid" --arg url "$url" '{paper_id: $pid, official_code_url: $url}' >> /app/result.jsonl
    sleep 2
done < /app/paper.txt

echo "Done" >&2
EOF
